This family is part of the order Gentianales, which also includes other flowering plant families like the gentian and apocynum families. Neobreonia decaryana is further classified as belonging to the tribe Vanguerieae. This tribe is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical Africa. The species Neobreonia decaryana is endemic to Madagascar, a unique and diverse island nation off the coast of East Africa.
